sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110777" key="fibi/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιβί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, name of the Ibis, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Hermes Thoth, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.167</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
